spec.title: Latency History
spec.description: Average latency across all relevant requests in the previous 10 seconds

spec.title: Order Counts
spec.description: Number of purchases in the last minute, updated every 10 seconds

spec.title: Login Attempts
spec.description: Number of login attempts in the last minute, updated every 10 seconds

spec.title: Revenue
spec.description: Revenue made in the last minute, updated every 10 seconds

spec.title: Active Users
spec.description: Number of users logged in to at least one session (sessions expire after 20 minutes of inactivity)

spec.title: Requests
spec.description: Number of requests made in the last minute, updated every 10 seconds

spec.title: Avg Latency
spec.description: Average latency across all relevant requests in the previous 10 seconds

spec.title: Active User History
spec.description: Number of users logged in to at least one session (sessions expire after 20 minutes of inactivity)
